HIRING NOW

Hiring Process Overview

01
01

Application Submission

Candidates submit resumes and cover letters via the company’s website or job portal.

02
02

Interviews

Shortlisted candidates are invited for one or more interviews (phone, virtual, or in-person).

03
03

Assessment & Decision

Some roles require skills assessments or case studies. Final interview, followed by a hiring decision and offer negotiation.

04
04

Onboarding

Onboarding is the structured process through which new employees are integrated into a company and its culture.

HIRING NOW

Open Positions

Apply Now

Data Integration Specialist

Responsible for integrating external business systems with ENX's platform. Requires knowledge of ERP systems such as Oracle, SAP, and NetSuite, along with API development and middleware tools
